description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: buildUbuntu, buildOSX, and buildWindows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, and windows-latest respectively). Each job checks out the repository and runs a complex series of make commands to build and install various libraries and tools from source, including lunar, sat_code, and jpl_eph.
